# Global Copilot Instructions

## Reading instruction files

When reading instruction files (such as those in `.github/instructions/`), always read the **entire file**. Use a large `endLine` value (for example, 500) to ensure no content is missed. Never assume 100 lines is sufficient.

The SadConsole source code is located on GitHub at https://github.com/Thraka/SadConsole and you can use it as a reference when writing code or conceptual material.

The `templates/template_code/SadConsole.Examples.Demo.CSharp` directory in the SadConsole GitHub repository contains a large collection of example code that can be used as a reference when writing code or conceptual material.
